title: Sector engagement commit window opened
body: Opened short-lived git:index/head claim 70f3219a-a816-469b-a563-70b6e2688e81 to stage and commit the sector-engagement planning taxonomy bundle. Current staged set was empty before opening the window. Commit queue was empty; Verdant Regrowing Pollen's TS6 claim remains active and disjoint except for shared-state surfaces. Scoped checks are green: Prettier, markdownlint, git diff --check, inline relative-link scan, stale-path scan, and collaboration-state check.
